messages.message: Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from 'no-unused-vars').
'useNavigate' is defined but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^[A-Z_]|motion/u.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'place'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [place, place.id]
